deja: They're looking for something specific. See how they're stopping everyone?
That's not a routine check. Someone called it in.
maya: The electronic signatures on those units — T2 Enforcer class.
They're hardwired to the Governor's registry.
If our names are still flagged, we're done the moment we step on.

player: Tomas cleared us. We should be fine.
deja: And if an enforcer asks for your output designation — say musician.
Works every time. They love musicians.

pre_fight: BRIDGE ENFORCER: HALT. NAME. OUTPUT CLASSIFICATION. TRAVEL PURPOSE.
BRIDGE ENFORCER: YOUR NAMES ARE NOT IN THE AUTHORIZED REGISTRY.
mid_fight: BRIDGE ENFORCER: RESISTANCE IS LOGGED AND WILL BE REVIEWED.
BRIDGE ENFORCER: ADDITIONAL UNITS DISPATCHED. TIME TO ARRIVAL: 4 MINUTES.

deja: Through the trees. Don't use the road.
